description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a beige perimeter wall and featuring a spacious front yard with several trees and landscaped greenery. The structure is predominantly white with flat roofs and large rectangular windows, providing a clean and minimalist aesthetic. The house includes multiple rooms visible from above, with interior spaces delineated by colored walls in shades of yellow, blue, and pink. The front facade is defined by a double-gate entry and a row of trees, while the rear and side yards are more open, with additional greenery and a paved area. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, and the main entrance is centrally located, accessible via a pathway through the garden. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped front and side yards enclosed by a beige wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double gate, and landscaped garden with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of trees along the left yard and a clear view into the interior room layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the open backyard area with more greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right yard with spaced trees and a less prominent entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main entry with a double gate, pathway through landscaped garden, and minimal decorative elements
